Drugstore Makeup Tutorial for Oily Skin type 👍🏽 Makeup tips for #oilyskin 👇🏾  - moisturize with oily control cream (oily skin is also dehydrated) - face prep with a matte setting spray and with a thin layer of powder to absorb excess oil and create a matte canvas  - use a soft matte or lumi matte foundation that is not fill coverage  - use matte setting spray BEFORE, DURING AND AFTER MAKEUP - set the face with thin layer of powder (set the blush and bronzer too) - lock in the eyelids with a blurring primer and powder (this will control oil and help mascara not smudge) @CeraVe Oil Control Moisturizing Gel  @loréal paris usa 3 second setting spray and Extentionist mascara  @Milani Cosmetics Mattefying setting spray and concealer + perfect powder  @e.l.f. Cosmetics matte magic mist and set and liquid camo bronzer  @Maybelline NY LUMI Matte foundation and Fit Me Concealer and Fit Me batter + Poreless Pressed Powder @COVERGIRL Trublend skin enhancer blush stick  @NYX Professional Makeup wonder snatch powder  #oilyskinmakeup #makeuptips #drusgtoremakeup #fullfacedrugstoremakeup

Advert 🖤 As a professional makeup artist, one of my favourite things is learning new techniques and experimenting with makeup! Korean makeup artists have such an incredible reputation when it comes to product knowledge and creating that fresh, perfected skin finish… so when I saw the viral foundation hack mixing @mixsoon bean essence with your foundation, I had to test the claims! The way it made my base sit on the skin was so beautiful!! Super glowy, more hydrated without being oily and just really skin-like without feeling heavy! After wearing it all day, I can fully see why so many Korean MUAs swear by this technique! #mixsoon #beanessence #makeuphack #mixsoonbeanessence
this makeup transition has been all over korean reels lolol i had to try #makeup #koreanmakeup #makeupinspo #kbeauty #makeuptransition #makeuptransformation #koreantrend #creatorsearchinsights #fyp
